A '''firefight''' on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kestos Minor/Legends|Kestos Minor]] was a battle of the [[Kwymar Suppressions/Legends|Kwymar Suppressions]], in [[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]]. The Rebel forces on [[Doniphon]] were defeated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Prelude==
Early during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], the Rebel bases in the [[Kwymar sector/Legends|Kwymar sector]] came under attack by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces in a campaign known as the [[Kwymar Suppressions/Legends|Kwymar Suppressions]]. [[Kestos Minor/Legends|Kestos Minor]] was one of those [[Planet/Legends|planets]] attacked.<ref name="Valance1" />

==The battle==
During the planetary assault, [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Modigal Glave]] would sustain facial damage. A blaster bolt shattered his helmet, sending [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] fragments into Glave's face. Despite the pain, Glave single-handedly held off a [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]] of Rebels until armored [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-ATs]] arrived. The Rebel forces on the planet were eventually subdued.<ref name="CM" />

==Aftermath==
As reward for his actions, Glave was promoted to lead an elite unit which would later become the [[Storm commando/Legends|storm commandos]]. Additionally, he was given the Imperial [[Medal of Valor/Legends|Medal of Valor]].<ref name="CM" />
